---
name: Tool / region request
about: Suggest a new letter, calculator, region, or template
title: "[request] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What tool or region?**
Describe the letter / calculator / region you'd like added.

**Use case**
Who needs it and when (recruiter, HR, teacher; which country/state)?

**References**
Any source for statutory rates / formulas (with year), if relevant — so the
estimate can be accurate and labelled.
